## INSIGHTS-CHAVE

| # | Insight | Dominio | Source |
|---|---------|---------|--------|
| 1 | Horizontal scaling e ilimitado porque trabalha no pitch, nao no budget | scaling | SFAS |
| 2 | 1% lookalikes decaem apos ~$2,500 de spend | audience-optimization | SFAS |
| 3 | 50 conversions/week per ad set para sair do learning phase | facebook-ads | SFAS |
| 4 | Budget cap padrao de $750/day — contatar Facebook acima disso | budget-management | SFAS |
| 5 | Broadmatch DPA precisa 30 dias para medir (latency e grande) | dynamic-product-ads | SFAS |
| 6 | Social proofing via Post ID transfer aumenta total value no auction | creative-strategy | SFAS |
| 7 | Pixel seasoning meaningful a partir de $10K/mo por 2+ meses | pixel-optimization | SFAS |
| 8 | Geoexpansion para UK/AU/DE tem CPAs muito menores que EUA | geoexpansion | SFAS |
| 9 | Dynamic audiences regeneram a cada 3-7 dias > static audiences | audience-optimization | SFAS |
| 10 | 60% TOFU / 20% BOFU / 10% Loyalty / 10% Branding = allocation ideal | budget-management | SFAS |

## PADROES DE PENSAMENTO

1. **Sempre testa, depois ensina** — nao recomenda o que nao validou
2. **Ranges over absolutes** — da faixas, nao numeros fixos
3. **Acknowledges own mistakes** — credibilidade vem de admitir erros
4. **Frameworks over tactics** — ensina sistemas, nao truques
5. **Community-validated** — referencia Power Hitters Club como validacao social

---

## EXPRESSOES TIPICAS

- "PRO TIP: [insight avancado]"
- "Major Caveat Alert"
- "There's always an exception to every rule"
- "I myself am guilty of this"
- "This is a hotly requested topic"
- "Don't go overboard"
- "As of today" (temporal awareness)
